chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 192 of 2023. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on M.A No. 714 of 2023. 2.For orders on office objections as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No.715 of 2023. ` 4.For hearing of main case. 21.03.2023. Mr.Faiz Muhammad Larik, advocate for the petitioner. ====== It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner was appointed as Malhi in Education Department; subsequently he was promoted as Clerk; now his salary for his promoted post as Clerk is not being paid by the respondents. By stating so, he sought for direction against the respondents to release his salary for his promoted post as Clerk. The petitioner obviously is a civil servant. Issue of his promotion and release of his salary for promoted post as Clerk could only be adjudicated by Service Tribunal having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
